name: Bob Cellarman
title: Tavern Owner
description: The harried owner of The Salty Anchor, forever wiping down a bar that never gets clean. Lately he keeps casting nervous glances at the cellar door.

greeting.first_time: Oh, thank the gods — a capable-looking sort! I'm Bob, I own this place. You don't happen to be the adventuring type, do you?
greeting.returning: Back again? The Anchor's always got a stool free for you.

main_menu.text: What can I do for you?

ask_about_tavern.text: The Salty Anchor's the finest tavern on the Goldenhaven docks — or it was, before the cellar started... squeaking. Best ale in the city, when I can get to the casks.

goodbye.text: Mind the cellar steps on your way out.
